mapper.select: select id, order_no, action, from_status, to_status, from_node_code, to_node_code, operator_username, operator_display_name, comment, created_at from work_order_histories where order_no = #{orderNo} order by created_at asc

select id, order_no, action, from_status, to_status, from_node_code, to_node_code, operator_username, operator_display_name, comment, created_at from work_order_histories where order_no = #{orderNo} order by created_at desc
select count(1) from work_order_histories where order_no = #{orderNo}
